intros.title: Who we are
intros.description: Founded in 2019, Gajera Brothers is a professionally managed, diversified enterprise based in India, delivering reliable solutions in construction, aluminium window and façade systems, and sustainable water management manufacturing. With a strong foundation in engineering and execution excellence, we support private, commercial, and government sector projects with a focus on quality, compliance, and long-term performance.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.title: To drive inclusive economic growth through ethical practices, cutting-edge solutions and community partnerships
mission.description: We combine ethics, innovation and community partnership to create long-term, measurable impact — focusing on sustainable growth and responsible stewardship.

title.title: Integrity
title.description: We uphold the highest standards of integrity in all our actions, fostering trust and transparency with our clients, partners, and communities.

title.title: Innovation
title.description: We embrace innovation to deliver cutting-edge solutions that meet the evolving needs of our clients and contribute to sustainable development.

title.title: Sustainability
title.description: We are committed to sustainable practices that minimize environmental impact and promote long-term well-being for future generations.

title.title: Community focus
title.description: We believe in giving back to the communities we serve, fostering partnerships that drive positive social and economic impact.

history.title: Foundation
history.desc: Establishment of Gajera Brothers. Entry into private residential construction

history.title: Expansion
history.desc: Execution of commercial construction projects. Entry into government construction works with strengthened compliance processes

history.title: Aluminium Solutions Division
history.desc: Launch of aluminium window and façade systems. Successful delivery for villas and bungalow projects

history.title: High-Rise Capability
history.desc: Expansion into aluminium solutions for high-rise towers. Enhancement of design, engineering, and execution expertise

history.title: Sustainability Initiative
history.desc: Entry into water management and water harvesting manufacturing. Setup of in-house shop floor for FRP membrane housing components

history.title: Product Range Expansion
history.desc: Manufacturing of a comprehensive range of FRP membrane housing components and spare parts. Supply across multiple sizes and configurations.

history.title: Integrated Operations
history.desc: Active presence across construction, aluminium systems, and sustainability sectors. Focus on long-term partnerships, innovation, and responsible development
